Surgical LightLEDOT 🏥 OT Equipment

LED Surgical Light (Shadowless)

High-intensity shadowless operating light with LED technology

Get a Quote

Share your requirements and we'll get back to you with pricing

WhatsApp Quote Call Now Email Inquiry
Quality Checked
Fast Dispatch
GST Invoice

Overview

Advanced LED surgical light with shadowless illumination. Features adjustable intensity, color temperature control, and long-lasting LED bulbs (50,000 hours). Modular design with spring-balanced arm system for precise positioning.

Key Features

  • Premium quality materials
  • Industry-standard specifications
  • Certified for medical use
  • Warranty support available
  • Competitive bulk pricing

Specifications

Illumination 40,000 - 160,000 lux
Color Temp 4000-5000K adjustable
CRI >95
LED Life 50,000 hours
Arm Length 180 cm
Warranty 3 Years
